paragraphs.source: Nubis was recently acquired by Ciena in October 2025. Similar to Ayar, Nubis offers optical engine chiplets to integrate with customer host silicon, but with an emphasis on single wavelength connections. Nubis has focused on interoperability – both protocol and mechanical (I.e., pluggable) – which has determined their technology choices. Nubis also has a broader mission to address the I/O wall in general, and their solutions encompass both optics and copper.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Nubis was recently [acquired by Ciena](https://www.ciena.com/about/newsroom/press-releases/ciena-to-acquire-nubis-communications-to-expand-its-inside-the-data-center-strategy-and-further-address-growing-ai-workloads) in October 2025. Similar to Ayar, Nubis offers optical engine chiplets to integrate with customer host silicon, but with an emphasis on single wavelength connections. Nubis has focused on interoperability – both protocol and mechanical (I.e., pluggable) – which has determined their technology choices. Nubis also has a broader mission to address the I/O wall in general, and their solutions encompass both optics and copper.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Nubis was recently acquired by Ciena in October 2025. Similar to Ayar, Nubis offers optical engine chiplets to integrate with customer host silicon, but with an emphasis on single wavelength connections. Nubis has focused on interoperability – both protocol and mechanical (I.e., pluggable) – which has determined their technology choices. Nubis also has a broader mission to address the I/O wall in general, and their solutions encompass both optics and copper.

pro.text: 2025年10月，Nubis 刚刚被 Ciena acquired 。与 Ayar 类似，Nubis 提供光引擎（Optical Engine，OE）芯粒以集成到客户的 host silicon 中，但重点在于单波长连接。Nubis 专注于互操作性——包括协议和机械（即可插拔）互操作性，这也决定了其技术选择。Nubis 还有更广泛的使命，即解决 I/O 墙问题，其解决方案同时涵盖光学和铜缆。
pro.tokenized_text: 2025年10月，Nubis 刚刚被 Ciena [[[LINK_1|acquired]]] 。与 Ayar 类似，Nubis 提供光引擎（Optical Engine，OE）芯粒以集成到客户的 host silicon 中，但重点在于单波长连接。Nubis 专注于互操作性——包括协议和机械（即可插拔）互操作性，这也决定了其技术选择。Nubis 还有更广泛的使命，即解决 I/O 墙问题，其解决方案同时涵盖光学和铜缆。

paragraphs.source: Their existing optical engine product is the Vesta 100 1.6T NPX optical engine. It is a socketable module that offers 1.6T of bi-directional bandwidth with 16 lanes of 100G. The module has a footprint of 6x7mm. Nubis, unlike other companies, are using MZMs in large part due to the interoperability, reliability, and maturity of the modulator. The other major design choice is that the Nubis is designed to be compatible with IEEE/OIF standards-compliant electrical interfaces as they believe most ASIC developers will continue to utilize these technologies.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Their existing optical engine product is the Vesta 100 1.6T NPX optical engine. It is a socketable module that offers 1.6T of bi-directional bandwidth with 16 lanes of 100G. The module has a footprint of 6x7mm. Nubis, unlike other companies, are using MZMs in large part due to the interoperability, reliability, and maturity of the modulator. The other major design choice is that the Nubis is designed to be compatible with IEEE/OIF standards-compliant electrical interfaces as they believe most ASIC developers will continue to utilize these technologies.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Their existing optical engine product is the Vesta 100 1.6T NPX optical engine. It is a socketable module that offers 1.6T of bi-directional bandwidth with 16 lanes of 100G. The module has a footprint of 6x7mm. Nubis, unlike other companies, are using MZMs in large part due to the interoperability, reliability, and maturity of the modulator. The other major design choice is that the Nubis is designed to be compatible with IEEE/OIF standards-compliant electrical interfaces as they believe most ASIC developers will continue to utilize these technologies.

pro.text:
**修订后的译文：**

他们现有的光引擎产品是 Vesta 100 1.6T NPX 光引擎。这是一个可插座式模块，可提供 1.6T 双向带宽，包含 16 条 100G 通道。该模块的尺寸为 6×7 mm。与其他公司不同，Nubis 大量采用马赫-曾德尔调制器（Mach-Zehnder Modulator，MZM），主要原因是该调制器具有良好的互操作性、可靠性和成熟度。另一个主要设计选择是，Nubis 兼容 IEEE/OIF 标准规定的电气接口，因为他们认为大多数 ASIC 开发商将继续使用这些技术。

paragraphs.source: A key point of differentiation for Nubis is how they couple fiber. Nubis couples the surface of the PIC, and specifically they use a thin piece of glass to help route and align the fibers. Unlike edge coupling where optical fibers are connected to the chip’s edge, Nubis’s 2D fiber array approach involves connecting optical fibers from the top of the silicon photonics die.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: A key point of differentiation for Nubis is how they couple fiber. Nubis couples the surface of the PIC, and specifically they use a thin piece of glass to help route and align the fibers. Unlike edge coupling where optical fibers are connected to the chip’s edge, Nubis’s 2D fiber array approach involves connecting optical fibers from the top of the silicon photonics die.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: A key point of differentiation for Nubis is how they couple fiber. Nubis couples the surface of the PIC, and specifically they use a thin piece of glass to help route and align the fibers. Unlike edge coupling where optical fibers are connected to the chip’s edge, Nubis’s 2D fiber array approach involves connecting optical fibers from the top of the silicon photonics die.

pro.text: Nubis 的一个关键差异化点在于其光纤耦合方式。Nubis 从 PIC 表面进行耦合，具体采用一块薄玻璃来帮助布线和对齐光纤。与将光纤连接到芯片边缘的边缘耦合不同，Nubis 的 2D 光纤阵列方案是从硅光子芯片顶部连接光纤。

paragraphs.source: Looking at the diagram below: the PIC (green at bottom) contains modulators, photo detectors and waveguides with EICs mounted on top. The red poles are optical fibers, while the block that contains the optical fibers is a glass block (FAU) which is used as a fiber holder. The FAU has laser-drilled holes at the top of the block to ensure exact fiber positioning. By employing a 2D fiber array, they are able to connect 36 optical fibers (16 for transmit, 16 for receive, 4 for lasers) to the PIC and avoid the need for WDM to get more lambdas over fewer fibers. This makes the Nubis FAU one of the densest currently shipping.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Looking at the diagram below: the PIC (green at bottom) contains modulators, photo detectors and waveguides with EICs mounted on top. The red poles are optical fibers, while the block that contains the optical fibers is a glass block (FAU) which is used as a fiber holder. The FAU has laser-drilled holes at the top of the block to ensure exact fiber positioning. By employing a 2D fiber array, they are able to connect 36 optical fibers (16 for transmit, 16 for receive, 4 for lasers) to the PIC and avoid the need for WDM to get more lambdas over fewer fibers. This makes the Nubis FAU one of the densest currently shipping.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Looking at the diagram below: the PIC (green at bottom) contains modulators, photo detectors and waveguides with EICs mounted on top. The red poles are optical fibers, while the block that contains the optical fibers is a glass block (FAU) which is used as a fiber holder. The FAU has laser-drilled holes at the top of the block to ensure exact fiber positioning. By employing a 2D fiber array, they are able to connect 36 optical fibers (16 for transmit, 16 for receive, 4 for lasers) to the PIC and avoid the need for WDM to get more lambdas over fewer fibers. This makes the Nubis FAU one of the densest currently shipping.

pro.text: 观察下图：PIC（底部绿色部分）包含调制器、光探测器和波导，其上方安装有 EIC。红色柱体为光纤，而容纳光纤的块状结构是玻璃块（FAU），用作光纤固定器。FAU 在块体顶部采用激光钻孔，以确保光纤精确定位。通过采用 2D 光纤阵列，他们能够将 36 根光纤（16 根发送、16 根接收、4 根激光器）连接到 PIC，并避免使用 WDM 在更少光纤上传输更多波长。这使得 Nubis 的 FAU 成为目前已出货产品中密度最高的光纤阵列之一。

pro.text: 2D 光纤阵列已被纳入台积电等公司的路线图，也是垂直耦合的一大优势。不过，目前除 Nubis 之外尚无其他公司实现量产，这使其脱颖而出，尽管其他厂商计划后续转向 2D 阵列。

paragraphs.source: The optical fibers go up and they bend sideways by employing special optical fibers, termed FlexBeamGuidE, developed by Sumitomo Electric that is able to exhibit high reliability and low loss whilst being bent at a 90-degree angle.

pro.text: 光纤向上引出后，通过采用住友电工开发的特殊光纤 FlexBeamGuidE 实现 90 度弯曲侧向引出，该光纤可在 90 度弯曲状态下仍保持高可靠性和低损耗。

paragraphs.source: Another benefit of using a 2D array rather than edge coupling is that you are less physically limited by the number of fibers that can be connected. As seen in the diagram below, using Nubis’s 2D Fiber array structure, multiple rows of optical engines can be placed around the ASIC, increasing bandwidth density provided the package permits that.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Another benefit of using a 2D array rather than edge coupling is that you are less physically limited by the number of fibers that can be connected. As seen in the diagram below, using Nubis’s 2D Fiber array structure, multiple rows of optical engines can be placed around the ASIC, increasing bandwidth density provided the package permits that.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Another benefit of using a 2D array rather than edge coupling is that you are less physically limited by the number of fibers that can be connected. As seen in the diagram below, using Nubis’s 2D Fiber array structure, multiple rows of optical engines can be placed around the ASIC, increasing bandwidth density provided the package permits that.

pro.text: 采用 2D 阵列而非边缘耦合的另一个优势是，在物理上受可连接光纤数量的限制更小。如图所示，使用 Nubis 的 2D 光纤阵列结构，可以在 ASIC 周围布置多排光引擎，只要封装允许，即可显著提升带宽密度。

paragraphs.source: In April 2025, Nubis announced the availability of its next generation PIC, a 16 x 200G per lane silicon photonics IC with unidirectional beachfront density of 0.5Tbps/mm (which matches electrical host interface densities). In addition, Nubis announced a partnership with Samtec whereby Nubis would sample a 32x 200G (6.4T) optical module snap-in compatible with Samtec Si-Fly HD Co-Packaged copper connector. Compared to alternative CPO approaches, this approach enables a common copper and optical footprint; this also over time could create an open pluggable ecosystem for deploying CPO.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: In April 2025, Nubis announced the availability of its next generation PIC, a 16 x 200G per lane silicon photonics IC with unidirectional beachfront density of 0.5Tbps/mm (which matches electrical host interface densities). In addition, Nubis announced a partnership with Samtec whereby Nubis would sample a 32x 200G (6.4T) optical module snap-in compatible with Samtec Si-Fly HD Co-Packaged copper connector. Compared to alternative CPO approaches, this approach enables a common copper and optical footprint; this also over time could create an open pluggable ecosystem for deploying CPO.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: In April 2025, Nubis announced the availability of its next generation PIC, a 16 x 200G per lane silicon photonics IC with unidirectional beachfront density of 0.5Tbps/mm (which matches electrical host interface densities). In addition, Nubis announced a partnership with Samtec whereby Nubis would sample a 32x 200G (6.4T) optical module snap-in compatible with Samtec Si-Fly HD Co-Packaged copper connector. Compared to alternative CPO approaches, this approach enables a common copper and optical footprint; this also over time could create an open pluggable ecosystem for deploying CPO.

pro.text: 2025 年 4 月，Nubis 宣布其下一代 PIC 量产，该硅光子芯片每通道支持 16×200G，单向前沿带宽密度达到 0.5Tbps/mm（与电气 host 接口密度相当）。此外，Nubis 宣布与 Samtec 合作，将提供 32×200G（6.4T）光模块样品，该模块可直接卡入 Samtec Si-Fly HD 共封装铜缆连接器。与其他共封装光学（Co-packaged Optics，CPO）方案相比，这种方法实现了铜缆与光学的通用封装尺寸，长期来看有可能形成一个开放的可插拔生态系统，用于部署 CPO。

paragraphs.source: Lastly, in copper, Nubis has also announced and demonstrated at OFC their linear redriver chip, Nitro, for active copper cables (ACC’s) that can extend the reach of 200G over copper to several meters. This is done in partnership with Amphenol who will build ACC’s based on the Nitro linear redriver.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Lastly, in copper, Nubis has also announced and demonstrated at OFC their linear redriver chip, Nitro, for active copper cables (ACC’s) that can extend the reach of 200G over copper to several meters. This is done in partnership with Amphenol who will build ACC’s based on the Nitro linear redriver.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Lastly, in copper, Nubis has also announced and demonstrated at OFC their linear redriver chip, Nitro, for active copper cables (ACC’s) that can extend the reach of 200G over copper to several meters. This is done in partnership with Amphenol who will build ACC’s based on the Nitro linear redriver.

pro.text:
**修订后的译文：**
最后，在铜缆领域，Nubis 也在 OFC 上宣布并展示了其线性重驱动器芯片 Nitro，用于有源铜缆（ACC），可将 200G 铜缆的传输距离延伸至数米。这一方案是与安费诺（Amphenol）合作开发的，后者将基于 Nitro 线性重驱动器芯片生产 ACC。
